title: Rubio promotes aide Michael Needham to top White House national security post — helped broker Israel-Lebanon talks
snippet: Secretary of State Marco Rubio promoted aide Michael Needham to a top White House national security post on May 26. Needham helped broker the Israel-Lebanon peace talks. The promotion signals the administration's commitment to the multi-track diplomatic approach and positions a key negotiation architect in the NSC.
tag_reason: New personnel move — Needham promotion signals diplomatic continuity
